title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
